mapper.select: SELECT source_type AS "sourceType", source_key AS "sourceKey", metric_code AS "metricCode", display_label AS "displayLabel", unit AS "unit" FROM follow_up_exam_metric_catalog ORDER BY source_type, source_key

SELECT ir.id AS "requestId", 'inspection' AS "examType", '检验' AS "examTypeLabel", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_type AS "techType", ir.inspection_time AS "observedAt", ir.inspection_state AS "state", ir.inspection_result AS "resultJson" FROM inspection_request ir LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ORDER BY ir.inspection_time DESC NULLS LAST, ir.id DESC

SELECT cr.id AS "requestId", 'check' AS "examType", CASE WHEN mt.tech_type = 'check' AND (mt.tech_name LIKE '%CT%' OR mt.tech_name LIKE '%MRI%' OR mt.tech_name LIKE '%放射%' OR mt.tech_name LIKE '%X%') THEN '放射' ELSE '检查' END AS "examTypeLabel", mt.tech_code AS "techCode", mt.tech_name AS "techName", mt.tech_type AS "techType", cr.check_time AS "observedAt", cr.check_state AS "state", cr.check_result AS "resultJson" FROM check_request cr LEFT JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ORDER BY cr.check_time DESC NULLS LAST, cr.id DESC
